narrative:
Clermont County has 147,757 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.6 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 27.9% of registrants.
